_comment: v4rian safety/* full lockdown. Pins safety/* creation to the allocator workflow's identity (active anchors) and safety/<vYYYY.MAIN>/<suffix> creation to the claim workflow's identity (archived anchors after 3-gate GC on main release). update is blocked everywhere so any anchor SHA is immutable for the life of the branch. Combined with the pool-creations ruleset this blocks the rename-equals-delete-plus-create attack vector for developers entirely. The include patterns cover both layouts: legacy flat refs/heads/safety/<suffix> (active anchors) and current refs/heads/safety/<vYYYY.MAIN>/<suffix> (archived anchors since pool/n48 introduced the major-prefix archival scheme). Apply via .io.v4rian.how-git/scripts/apply-repo-rules.sh or bin/lockdown. The ACTOR_ID placeholder is substituted at apply time with the integration id of the GitHub Actions bot on the target repo (gh api /orgs/{org}/installations --jq '.installations[] | select(.app_slug=="github-actions") | .id').
name: v4rian-safety-lockdown
